title: CMD.BSP.001.TIE.APPLY_TIER_TRANSITION — Apply algorithmic tier transition
description: Payload of the APPLY_TIER_TRANSITION command. Issued by POL.BSP.001.TIE.ON_SCORE_THRESHOLD_REACHED, handled by AGG.BSP.001.TIE.TIER_OF_CASE. Emits exactly one of BNK.RLVR.RVT.TIER_UPGRADE_RECORDED or BNK.RLVR.RVT.TIER_DOWNGRADE_RECORDED depending on transition.direction. Idempotent on trigger.event_id over a 30-day window. Rejected with OVERRIDE_IN_FORCE if a prescriber override is active on the case.

case_id.description: CORRELATION KEY. Reference to the participation case (Reliever case ID). Identity resolution to BNK.RLVR.OBJ.REF.001.BENEFICIARY_RECORD.internal_id is delegated to consumers via BNK.RLVR.CAP.REF.001.BEN lookup.

event_id.description: IDEMPOTENCY KEY. Identifier of the upstream BNK.RLVR.RVT.SCORE_THRESHOLD_REACHED event that triggered this command. Establishes causation for the resulting tier-transition event.

kind.description: Discriminator. Currently only SCORE_THRESHOLD is supported — algorithmic transitions are driven exclusively by BNK.RLVR.CAP.BSP.001.SCO threshold crossings.

source_event_capability.description: Optional — the upstream emitter (BNK.RLVR.CAP.BSP.001.SCO). Useful for audit lineage.

direction.description: Directional polarity. UPGRADE emits BNK.RLVR.RVT.TIER_UPGRADE_RECORDED; DOWNGRADE emits BNK.RLVR.RVT.TIER_DOWNGRADE_RECORDED. The aggregate verifies coherence with source_tier_code/target_tier_code in BNK.RLVR.CAP.REF.001.TIE ordering — INV.TIE.005.

source_tier_code.description: Tier code the case is leaving (per BNK.RLVR.CAP.REF.001.TIE ordering).

target_tier_code.description: Tier code the case is entering (per BNK.RLVR.CAP.REF.001.TIE ordering).

tier_definitions_version.description: Optional — the BNK.RLVR.CAP.REF.001.TIE definitions version that produced the source/target codes. Used to detect race conditions with concurrent referential updates.

occurred_at.description: Timestamp of the upstream behavioural fact (ISO-8601, UTC recommended). Used for ordering, NOT for idempotency.
